concerns.text: SC-001 requires the test‑set ROC‑AUC to be measured against a random‑prediction baseline (AUC = 0.50), but no task in tasks.md (e.g., T026) records or asserts this baseline comparison.
SC-002 requires the false‑discovery rate to be measured and asserted to be ≤ 0.05 after correction; task T027 only applies Benjamini–Hochberg but does not capture or validate the resulting FDR value.
The implementation plan lists contract artifacts (e.g., `contracts/dataset.schema.yaml`, `contracts/model_output.schema.yaml`) but there is no task that creates or updates these contract files.
The plan references a data‑model design document (`data-model.md`) yet no task in tasks.md is dedicated to producing or revising this document.
A quickstart guide (`quickstart.md`) is listed as a plan deliverable, but no task is assigned to author or maintain it.
Constitution Principle VII mandates a bug‑label reliability validation script; tasks.md contains no task that implements this validation step.
